title: microsoft/AI-For-Beginners
friendlyTitle: A free beginner course for learning AI
summary: Microsoft's AI-For-Beginners repository is a structured 12-week, 24-lesson curriculum covering core AI concepts for learners and teams building baseline literacy.
friendlySummary: Microsoft's repo offers a 12-week set of AI lessons for people who want to understand the basics.
whyItMatters: Use it as a guided learning plan for onboarding colleagues, refreshing fundamentals, or creating an internal AI study group without starting from a blank syllabus.
friendlyWhyItMatters: You can use it to learn AI step by step or help a team build shared knowledge.
